_note: M5-F1 defensive per-panel a11y coverage fragment (create-or-append). The M5-F6 a11y harness reconciles these via the append-only coverage.manifest.jsonl (which carries the matching builtin.viewport line + the registry.cpp registration); this per-panel file documents the panel's own gui-viewport-test_a11y coverage.

a11y_scan.assertion: uitree::audit_a11y() returns zero violations for the observer viewport across ready / adapter-absent / surface-unavailable / render-failed present states and empty vs populated scenes (including after re-framing)

keyboard_nav.assertion: uitree::focus_order() reaches the single focusable node (the frame-scene button) and the viewport.frame-scene command has a keyboard path (complete keyboard-only navigation)
